name: run-pytest
description: Run pytest tests with venv auto-detection or explicit python, config loading, env vars, output limiting, warning suppression, and grep filtering of test results, replacing cd + python -m pytest + tail/grep chains.

parameters.name: test_path
parameters.description: Test file or directory path (multiple allowed)

parameters.name: --config
parameters.description: Path to env config file with KEY=VALUE lines to load before execution

parameters.name: --env
parameters.description: Set an env var as KEY=VALUE (repeatable)

parameters.name: --tail
parameters.description: Show last N lines of output (default: 50)

parameters.name: --head
parameters.description: Show first N lines of output

parameters.name: --grep
parameters.description: Filter output lines matching PATTERN (grep -E), e.g. PASSED|FAILED|ERROR

parameters.name: --suppress-warnings
parameters.description: Filter out common Python deprecation/noise lines (DeprecationWarning, pkg_resources, site-packages warnings) to reduce observation cost

parameters.name: --python
parameters.description: Explicit path to Python interpreter, e.g. /app/venv/bin/python

examples.expected: Filtered test results (warnings suppressed) showing PASSED/FAILED/ERROR lines

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd + venv/bin/python -m pytest + flags + tail + grep into one step, saving 4-6 agent steps per test run; --suppress-warnings filters out noisy DeprecationWarning lines reducing observation cost by 50-80%.
